title: Playfair Cipher Encryption Process
description: A step-by-step flowchart illustrating the procedure to encrypt a message using the Playfair Cipher algorithm.
relationships: Prepare message by splitting into digraphs and applying rules
Use key matrix to locate digraph letters
Apply cipher rules based on letter positions (same row, same column, rectangle) to encrypt each digraph
Combine encrypted digraphs to form final ciphertext
